docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMUTH, JOEN AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, VICTORIA
2/29/08 OFF-CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO DEFT. MUNGUIA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,400.00 FILED BY DEMUTH, JOEN AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE PLAINTIFF THAT HE WILL NOT PURSUE THE CASE FURTHER. DEFT PASSED AWAY.

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF PER LETTER OF MARCH 25, 2008. (LETTER FILED ON APRIL 4, 2008). NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
